title: Amtech S4120 12 Piece fine pointed tip art brush set

features: FOR DETAILED WORK: This assortment of 12 paint brushes with pointed tips is ideal for detailed work
WOODEN HANDLES: These brushes have wooden handles with the sizes printed on each and range in length from 13-15cm
ALL TYPES OF ART PROJECTS: Ideal for all types of arts and crafts projects, including painting canvasses, ceramics and miniature models
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and tool products come with a 36 month assurance and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No
